text.title: Objection Bank Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Objection Bank end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: harvest-objections
step.action: Extract objections from last 30 days of sources.

step.name: draft-response-templates
step.action: ≤150-word template per cluster, verified against real wins.

step.name: weekly-review
step.action: Weekly review: new + stale + top-10 audit.
